nodes.context: Italian-American organized crime group operating in Baltimore, Maryland, from 1900s to 1990s.
New York-based Mafia family that controlled the Baltimore Crew from 1955 onward.
Italian organized crime group; a member was killed by Patsy Corbi in 1923.

edges.context: The Baltimore Crew became a faction of the Gambino crime family in 1955, with local leaders answering to Gambino capos.
Patsy Corbi of the Baltimore Crew murdered a reputed Camorra member in 1923.
